news.title: Reuters AI News | Latest Headlines and Developments
news.snippet: AI startup Thinking Machines clinches capital and a major chip supply deal from Nvidia. Legal AI startup Legora raises $550 million to speed up US expansion. China pins hopes on society-wide AI push to add jobs, rejuvenate economy.

tech.title: How to Learn AI in 2026 and Shape the Future
tech.snippet: This book zooms in on how AI-driven systems can solve real-world problems, from disaster relief to ethical sourcing. Practical examples show how connected technology impacts human transformation.
